description_long: This sculpture depicts a fantastical goblin-like bust with exaggerated facial features, including large pointed ears, a single central forehead eye, and prominent tusks. The figure has a textured, almost stone-like surface and is adorned with a single, segmented shoulder guard on its right side. The bust is mounted on a rectangular plinth with an inscription at the front, adding a sense of permanence and formality. The back reveals a muscular, ridged anatomy and a continuation of the detailed surface texture. The left ear is decorated with a hoop earring, and the overall form is robust and compact. The sculpture's stylized, mythical appearance makes it a striking focal point for public or urban spaces.
description: A detailed bust of a goblin-like creature with large ears, tusks, a single shoulder guard, and a textured stone-like finish, mounted on a plinth with an inscription.
description_view_0: Front view showing the goblin's expressive face, large ears, tusks, central forehead eye, and the inscribed plinth.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the segmented shoulder guard and the profile of the face and ear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the muscular back, ridged anatomy, and the continuation of the shoulder guard.
description_view_3: Left side view focusing on the ear with a hoop earring and the profile of the bust's head and torso.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
